TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Ciyibangcalay ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Ci'an go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 23 buwan, 75 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 19% kyan ku 14 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 81% kyan ku 61 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 19%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Ciyibangcalay hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Ciyibangcalay hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Ciyibangcalay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Ciyibangcalay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Ciyibangcalay hya' ga Cikasuwan. tay mkyahu' na Ciyibangcalay hya' ga Kungkung. tay 'llaw na Ciyibangcalay hya' ga Ciripunan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨijiβaŋʦ~ʨalaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu ʦ~ʨiʔan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨijiβaŋʦ~ʨalaj ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨijiβaŋʦ~ʨalaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨijiβaŋʦ~ʨalaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨijiβaŋʦ~ʨalaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨijiβaŋʦ~ʨalaj ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨikas~ɕuwan. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨijiβaŋʦ~ʨalaj ħjaʔ ɣa kuŋkuŋ. taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨijiβaŋʦ~ʨalaj ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨiripunan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Ciyibangcalay ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Ci'an go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 23 buwan, 75 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 19% kyan ku 14 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 81% kyan ku 61 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 19%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Ciyibangcalay hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Ciyibangcalay hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Ciyibangcalay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Ciyibangcalay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Ciyibangcalay hya' ga Cikasuwan. tay mkyahu' na Ciyibangcalay hya' ga Kungkung. tay 'llaw na Ciyibangcalay hya' ga Ciripunan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨijiβaŋʦ~ʨalaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu ʦ~ʨiʔan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨijiβaŋʦ~ʨalaj ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨijiβaŋʦ~ʨalaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨijiβaŋʦ~ʨalaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨijiβaŋʦ~ʨalaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨijiβaŋʦ~ʨalaj ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨikas~ɕuwan. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨijiβaŋʦ~ʨalaj ħjaʔ ɣa kuŋkuŋ. taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨijiβaŋʦ~ʨalaj ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨiripunan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
